The '''Starscream-9 Ion Drive''' was a type of [[Ion engine/Legends|ion engine]] made by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]] for military use in fighters. Costing half a million [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] and weighing in at 24 metric tons, this drive was an example of cutting edge technology of the period. It was exceedingly difficult to modify, and civilian possession of a Starscream-9 was a class one infraction in Imperial space.
